  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/libnfc         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  New port: devel/libnfc
    The libnfc provides a simple yet complete low-level API for handling NFC
    devices and building NFC applications.
  
  PR:             ports/142836
  Submitted by:   me
  Approved by:    flz (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3809    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +20 -0     ports/devel/libnfc/pkg-plist (new)
